name: Pumpkin Cake Three Rivers
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Blend butter and egg into cake mix in a large bowl until smooth. Pour batter into a greased and floured 9x13 inch pan, patting mixture evenly over the bottom and up the sides of the pan.
3. Mix pumpkin, eggs, sugars, milk, and seasonings in a separate bowl until well combined. Pour this mixture over the baked cake layer.
4. In another bowl, combine reserved cake mix with sugar and softened butter to form walnut-sized balls. Place these on top of the pumpkin mixture.
5. Sprinkle chopped nuts (if using) over the topping.
6. Bake for 35-45 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean. Allow to cool before serving.
This recipe remains accurate to the original while ensuring clarity and consistency in presentation.
